name: Buttermilk Drop Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a Dutch oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together flour, sugar, salt, baking powder, nutmeg, and baking soda.
3. Add vegetable oil, buttermilk, and egg; beat with a fork until smooth.
4. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls into the hot oil. Do not make them too large or they will not cook through.
5. Fry for about 3 minutes or until golden brown on both sides. Drain on paper towels.
6. Immediately roll in sugar.
YIELD: about 3 1/2 dozen drop doughnuts
